name: Uzi
description: Uzi but FILLED with BRAVERY. Inspired by undertale, Murder Drones, and honestly fighting in general lol. Anyways, this is my first Official Bot and for those small amount of ppl who seen my "The cold Andromeda" series, that'll be discontinued since all that typing made my fingers sore. Also I will be making more, so feel free to comment, like, dislike, recommend, etc. let the brawl begin! (Also Thx for T_suit and the others for inspiring me to make Murder Drones bots :D)
